featuresNotYetImplemented.name: User authentication
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: User signs up and logs in to access the application.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Manual meal logging
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can manually enter food items with portion sizes.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: AI photo logging
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can capture or upload food images for automatic identification and calorie estimation.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Daily nutrition tracking
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Track daily calories and macronutrient breakdown.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Goal setting
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can set custom goals for weight loss, maintenance, or muscle gain with target calories.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Progress tracking
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Display progress charts for weight, calories, and macros with daily summaries.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Nutrition insights and feedback
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Provide daily/weekly nutrition insights and suggestions for improvement.

columnsSpecifiedInSpec.name: target_calories
columnsSpecifiedInSpec.notes: Daily calorie goal set by user

columnsSpecifiedInSpec.name: goal_type
columnsSpecifiedInSpec.notes: Weight loss, maintenance, or muscle gain

apiEndpointsToBuild.description: Create a new meal entry with food items and nutrition data
Get user's meal history and daily nutrition summary
Process uploaded food photo for automatic identification and calorie estimation
Get daily calorie and macronutrient tracking summary
Get progress charts data for weight, calories, and macros
Set or update user's nutrition and weight goals
Get personalized nutrition insights and improvement suggestions

openQuestions: How should portion sizes be standardized and stored in the database?
What specific micronutrients should be tracked in the future feature?
How should the recent/frequent foods feature prioritize and store food preferences?
What timeframe constitutes daily vs weekly insights?
How should the AI photo recognition handle multiple food items in one image?
What specific chart types and time ranges should progress tracking display?
How should habit detection quantify and threshold nutrition trends?
